name: Gungnir Resources Inc.
summary: Gungnir Resources Inc., a junior mineral exploration company, engages in the acquisition, evaluation, and exploration of mineral properties. It primarily explores for gold and base metals. The company's key project is the Knaften property that covers 4,887 hectares located in Finland. It also explores for nickel and copper deposits. The company was formerly known as Anglo Swiss Resources Inc. and changed its name to Gungnir Resources Inc. in April 2014. Gungnir Resources Inc. was founded in 1966 and is based in Surrey, Canada.
